title: Modals and bookmark dialog above PDF fullscreen (dbg102)
description:
Create Bookmark and other modals opened behind the fullscreen PDF workspace (modal z-index 999 vs fullscreen 9200). Mike confirmed closing the workspace revealed the bookmark dialog underneath.

dbg102 raises modals, bookmark catalog, edge/mask floats, and nested context submenus above the fullscreen shell (z-index 9301+), with a JS elevation pass after each render.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer / Map Builder fullscreen.
changeLog: Raise plan modals and bookmark-create dialog above fullscreen overlay.
Raise bookmark catalog and nested context submenus above fullscreen.
JS elevation pass after render when fullscreen session active.
